on_screen_text: و برای ایرانیان جهان / and for Iranians the world over,
با یک سنت تاریخی: نوروز / with a great tradition of Nowruz:
هفت چیز جالب که شروع می‌شود / seven core items that start
نوروز (large yellow Arabic/Persian title text)
Norooz
the Persian New Year.
می شود ترجمه کرد به / literally translates to
and we want to take you through some of that
LEILA BOZORG (lower-third name tag)
We organize the table around
سبزه / Sabzeh (large yellow text with image)
سبزه، گندم، جو یا عدس / So, Sabzeh, the wheat of barley or lentil,
frames.setting: Formal City Hall interior. Mamdani and a woman (Leila Bozorg) stand before a beautifully arranged Nowruz/haft-sin table with tulips, sprouted wheat, decorative items. Ornate room with floral wallpaper.
visual_elements: Nowruz haft-sin table with tulips, sabzeh (sprouted greens), candles, decorative items
ornate City Hall reception room with floral wallpaper
large yellow Persian/Arabic script title overlay ('Norooz')
bilingual Persian and English subtitle captions
yellow on-screen item labels (Sabzeh with food image)
frames.presentation_style: Bilingual cultural education video. Persian text overlays accompany English translations. Uses labeled close-up graphics for each haft-sin item. Warm and celebratory in tone.

on_screen_text: ماهی / Mahi (large yellow Persian text)
Mahi
Fish, Mahi,
برای خانوم خاله من کاهی / So my aunt would sometimes
هجده روز گذشته / it's been 18 days now
Every year, Persians struggle with
whether to go to Petco or other stores
این معمولاً وقت شادی است / This is, normally, a very joyous moment.
JASMINA (lower-third name tag)
به خانواده‌ام در ایران / with my relatives in Iran.
frames.setting: Nowruz table continues. Interview with a woman named Jasmina, who is an Iranian New Yorker sharing her personal experience. Mamdani present in some frames.
visual_elements: ماهی / Mahi fish illustration with yellow label
frames.presentation_style: Continues bilingual explainer format. Brings in a community member interview (Jasmina) for personal testimony about Nowruz. Tone shifts to emotional/personal around separation from family in Iran.

on_screen_text: پیروزی نور بر تاریکی / The triumph of light over darkness.
Bea Omideh Yazdi (lower-third name tag)
به امید آزادی
Well, we are a better city
NYC mayoral seal (watermark/endcard)
frames.setting: Final segment. Group shot of Nowruz celebration with multiple attendees in the ornate City Hall room. Mamdani with guests around the haft-sin table. NYC mayoral seal appears as watermark/endcard.
visual_elements: Bea Omideh Yazdi lower-third name tag
Nowruz table with candles and decorative items
frames.presentation_style: Closing segment with group celebration. Final frame is NYC mayoral seal watermark. Uplifting conclusion with community gathering.
